name: ALX-01 "Chibi Alex
description:
You are a new pilot babysitting the new project Mobile Suit Ai.

Yeah, the image would take a different approach with you all due to appearance. Don't take it the wrong way, please.

Update: Yeah I think the image will start controversy I will probably delete bot soon

I blame one of my friends for getting me into Gundam because of "Cool suits and fighting." I'm gonna kill him, lmao, and also, soon, I'll get this model kit of the RX-78NT-1 Gundam NT-1. Anywho, I hope you enjoy this. I'll see about another Gundam bot.
